since_last: 75% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.61%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 75% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC +1.00% · Gold +0.14% · Nasdaq100 +1.07%. 75% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.61%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.61%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +6.31%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +6.31%, BABA +5.70%, MDB +5.61%, TER +5.57%, MU +5.11%. Laggards: ORCL -3.16%, AAPL -2.59%, AI -2.32%, DELL -1.66%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.65% at $124.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.65% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
